title: Nauru Air Corporation (Amendment) Act 2026
text:
REPUBLIC OF NAURU 
NAURU AIR CORPORATION (AMENDMENT) 
ACT 2026 
_____________________________ 
No. 4 of 2026 
______________________________ 
 
An Act to amend the Nauru Air Corporation Act 1995 and for other related purposes. 
 
Certified: 14 January 2026 
Table of Provisions 
1 Short title ....................................................................................................................................... 2 
2 Commencement ............................................................................................................................ 2 
3 Amendment of the Nauru Air Corporation Act 1995 ...................................................................... 2 
4 Amendment of Section 4 ............................................................................................................... 2 
5 Amendment of Section 7 ............................................................................................................... 2

2 
 
Enacted by the Parliament of Nauru as follows: 
1 Short title 
This Act may be cited as the Nauru Air Corporation (Amendment) Act 2026. 
2 Commencement 
This Act commences on the date it is certified by the Speaker. 
3 Amendment of the Nauru Air Corporation Act 1995 
The Nauru Air Corporation Act 1995 is amended by the provisions of this Act. 
4 Amendment of Section 4 
Section 4 is amended by inserting the following definition after the definition for 
‘Minister’: 
‘ ‘Nauru-Australia Treaty’ means the Treaty signed between the Government of 
Nauru and the Government of Australia at the Parliament House in Canberra, 
Australia on 9 December 2024; ’. 
5 Amendment of Section 7 
Section 7(1) is amended by inserting ‘, one of which shall be the Director General 
appointed for the purposes of the Nauru-Australia Treaty’ after ‘2019’.
